title: Recovery Pod × Karisma
description: Title slide with BH Labs and Karisma co-branding
speakerNotes: Prepared specifically for Karisma Hotels & Resorts. Emphasize portfolio-wide opportunity.

title: The Opportunity
description: Market stats showing wellness economy opportunity
speakerNotes: Wellness is $6.8T. Hotels with wellness programs see 108% higher RevPAR.

title: The Problem
description: Traditional hotel spa economics and why they don't scale
speakerNotes: Traditional spas cost $500K-$1.5M. Consumer franchises can't serve resorts. Gap in the market.

title: The Recovery Pod
description: Recovery Pod specifications and equipment imagery
speakerNotes: 500-750 sqft, $49K, 7 modalities, under 90 days, zero additional staff.

title: Karisma Portfolio Fit
description: Mapping of Recovery Pod configurations to each Karisma property
speakerNotes: Each property gets a tailored configuration. Roatan is new build — design Recovery Center in from scratch. Pilot 1-2 properties first.

title: The Guest Experience
speakerNotes: Three tiers from $75 to $300+. Protocol sequencing is our IP — the order matters for outcomes.

title: The Investment
speakerNotes: $49K everything included. Total year 1: $47K-$72K. Multi-property discount for portfolio deployment.

title: Proof of Concept
description: Equinox case study with key metrics
speakerNotes: 900+ sessions/month at Equinox. 173% YoY growth. NPS 85. Hotel guests in pay-per-experience mindset unlock same intensity.

title: ROI Calculator
description: Interactive calculator with ADR surcharge, à la carte sessions, and multi-property portfolio multiplier
speakerNotes: Key feature: multi-property slider. Show them 3 properties at moderate assumptions = $3M+ annual. ADR surcharge + à la carte = dual revenue streams.

title: Next Steps
description: Closing slide with pilot → rollout framework
speakerNotes: Pick 1-2 pilot properties. 90-day deployment. Prove demand. Roll across portfolio. Keep it simple.
